# SABA Design

سابا ديزاين — وكالة رقمية سعودية متخصصة في تصميم وتطوير المواقع والتطبيقات والهوية البصرية والتسويق الرقمي.

SABA Design is a Saudi digital agency specializing in web and mobile development, brand identity, UI/UX design, digital marketing, and SEO.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://saba-design.com/): Overview of SABA Design services and value proposition.
- [About](https://saba-design.com/about): Company story, team, and mission.
- [Services](https://saba-design.com/services): Full catalogue of digital services and pricing tiers.
- [Portfolio](https://saba-design.com/portfolio): Case studies and previous client projects.
- [Plans](https://saba-design.com/plans): Subscription plans and packages.
- [Contact](https://saba-design.com/contact): How to reach the team and request a quote.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://saba-design.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://saba-design.com/terms)
